allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add platform billing scraper and improve header display

- Add billing page scraper for platform.claude.com to show API credit balance
- Add separate platform login flow (platform.claude.com uses different auth than claude.ai)
- Update header to show plan name and email (e.g., "Max Plan - user@email.com")
- Extract plan and email from Claude usage page
- Remove unused ModelBreakdown component and API cost report code
- Simplify types by removing unused API data interfaces
- Show "Login to Platform" button when billing info unavailable
- Fix platform login window to stay open until login completes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''''electron-store''''\); console.log\(typeof s, typeof s.default\)")
Bash(node -e "const Store = require\(''electron-store''\); const s = new Store\(\); s.set\(''test'', 1\); console.log\(s.get\(''test''\)\)")
